name: Atomos
description: This particle cannon generates a condensed beam of super-heated plasma designed to melt rock to ore, and enemies to molten slag.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This particle cannon generates a condensed beam of super-heated plasma designed to melt rock to ore, and enemies to molten slag.

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed arm cannon type (Epitaph, Gammacor, Atomos) reticle area being blocked by a part of Zephyr Harrier's shoulder element.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Added updated wrist-mounted weapon animations (ie Gammacor, Epitaph, Atomos, etc).

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error with the Atomos.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed arm mounted Secondaries (Atomos, Gammacor, etc) not playing custom idle animations. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1082719-arm-mounted-secondaries-broken-animation-thigh-holster-problem/

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where interrupting the Atomos reload could leave it with parts detached.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atomos missing its beam chain FX.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a rare crash from starting a mission with a beam style weapon (Atomos, Spectra, etc).

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed performance issues related to the Atomos.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Atomos rumble on controllers.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.6.3
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the Atomos rumbling feedback duration when using a controller.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Increased damage of Atomos in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.changes: •    Decreased the rumble amount on controllers when continuously firing the Atomos, Gammacor, Glaxion, and Amprex.•    Changed the damage radius of hull breaches in Corpus tilesets to affect the entire room, not just a small area near the breach. Fixing in another Hotfix.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Atomos causing Mag’s Bullet Attractor bubble to turn black when hit.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Atomos not properly alerting enemies on use.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some lingering visual FX from Atomos/Amprex when used with Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/518981-atomos-beam-glitch-with-mirage-hom/

patchlogs.name: Update 16.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue causing Atomos particle effects to hover in mid-air after being fired as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/463128-floating-atomos-beams/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a visual bug related to using the Atomos on certain enemies as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/458340-atomos-specific-infested-death-animation-visual-bug/

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.fixes:
Boltace Tonfa, Daikyu Bow and Atomos Particle Cannon available now!
Tenno, master three new additions to the Warframe Arsenal! Equip the Boltace tonfa, Daikyu bow or Atomos particle cannon to bring destruction to the enemy.
